description: Read catalog entries from the ESE catalog B-tree
steps: Open a synthetic ESE database with a minimal catalog page at page 4
Call EseDatabase::catalog_entries() to retrieve all catalog entries
Verify at least one entry is returned
Verify each entry has an object_name and table_page fields

description: Look up a table root page number by object name
steps: Construct a synthetic ESE database with a catalog containing a known table name
Verify the returned page number matches the encoded value

description: find_table_page returns Err for unknown table names
steps: Call EseDatabase::find_table_page('NonExistentTable') on a database without that table
Verify Err is returned with a descriptive message
